My Profile

Spaces that feel
lived in. Loved in.

"I'm drawn to lived-in luxury — calm, natural spaces that balance nature with modern practicality."

Molesey-based creative with a sharp eye for texture and light, shaped by solo travel across South East Asia. I bring luxury hospitality experience, real reliability, and a genuine passion for interior design.

✦
Strong visual instinct for colour, texture & atmosphere
✦
Confident communication & client care from luxury environments
✦
Reliable, organised and calm under pressure

Design Aesthetic

Three worlds.
One vision.

Biophilic & Coastal

Ocean palettes, sandy yellows, driftwood and soft linens. I bring the outside in — creating tranquil spaces where light does the heavy lifting. Nature isn't decoration; it's the foundation.

Modern Farmhouse & Boho Mediterranean

Sun-drenched warmth meets eclectic soul. Inspired by Italy and Greece, I layer aged wood, ceramics and olive-sage accents into spaces that feel both grounded and alive.

Minimalist–Maximalism

Clean lines as the canvas. Bold textures, curated décor and statement moments as the personality. I love the tension between restraint and expression — and finding that sweet spot.

Travel & Inspiration

South East Asia
changed everything.

Solo travel across South East Asia deepened my appreciation for craftsmanship, natural materials and the art of indoor-outdoor living.

Seeing traditional techniques and varied architectural forms in real spaces — not on a screen — was what made interior design feel like a calling.

Natural ventilation Timber & woven materials Indoor–outdoor living Wellness-centred spaces
